name: Danish Law MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for querying Danish legal databases — Danish legislation, regulations, and court decisions from retsinformation.dk (the official Danish law database). Enables AI agents to search and retrieve Danish statutes, administrative orders, and regulatory texts for legal research and compliance.
use_cases: Searching Danish legislation from AI legal research agents
Retrieving specific Danish laws and administrative orders for compliance agents
Analyzing Danish regulatory frameworks for EU regulatory compliance agents
Building Danish-language legal AI assistants with access to official Danish law
not_for: Teams without Danish-language capability (content in Danish)
Legal advice — informational research tool only
best_when: A Danish legal tech developer, law firm, or compliance team working with Danish law wants AI agents to query official Danish legislation and regulatory texts.
avoid_when: You need other jurisdictions. Also: content is in Danish — requires Danish language handling.

auth.notes: No authentication — accesses public Danish government legal database (retsinformation.dk).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — Danish government legal databases are public
pricing.notes: Danish law databases are publicly accessible. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Danish government API rate limits apply informally

known_agent_gotchas: Content in Danish — agents must handle Danish text and legal terminology
Danish government API availability may vary — implement retry logic
Informational research only — not a substitute for qualified Danish legal counsel
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public Danish legal data. EU/GDPR jurisdiction. Government servers. HTTPS.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public legal data. EU data residency. GDPR jurisdiction.
